_comment: Machine-readable license policy for Vibe MyBooks (PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0).

knownIssues.pulledInBy: vite (dev dependency — never shipped to users)
knownIssues.action: Acceptable. CC-BY-4.0 is a data/creative-works license. This package is build-time only and not bundled into the application. No attribution required in shipped code.
knownIssues.notes: Dev dependency only. Does not affect runtime or distribution.
Dual-licensed. Apache-2.0 option is on the allowed list.

knownIssues.detectedLicense: MIT OR SEE LICENSE IN FEEL-FREE.md
knownIssues.notes: FEEL-FREE.md is a permission-granting notice, not a restriction. license-checker reports this as MIT*.

knownIssues.action: Accept. Generic BSD license; effectively BSD-2-Clause or BSD-3-Clause terms.
knownIssues.notes: license-checker reports this as BSD* due to the non-SPDX 'BSD' string in package.json.

knownIssues.action: Resolved via top-level override `unzipper@^0.12.3` in root package.json. Newer unzipper removes the `binary`→`buffers` transitive chain.
knownIssues.notes: Was pulled in by exceljs → unzipper@0.10.x → binary → buffers. No longer in the dependency tree.

licenseFile.status: PRESENT — full PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0 text with licensor preamble

noticeFile.status: PRESENT — copyright, attribution, and third-party notices

sourceHeaders.status: ENFORCED — All first-party source files carry the PolyForm header; check-license-headers.sh runs in CI and as a pre-commit hook.
sourceHeaders.note: PolyForm Internal Use requires that licensing notices not be removed or obscured where present. Extensions covered: .ts, .tsx, .js, .jsx, .mjs, .cjs, .sql, .sh, .py.

noDistribution.status: ENFORCED — PolyForm Internal Use prohibits distribution of the software
noDistribution.note: Distribution restriction is a core term of the license.
